reason: Check that the implementation stays inside the C++/MLIR/LLVM/TableGen/CMake/lit/FileCheck stack and unified TCRV scope.
Check that tcrv.exec carries only execution/ABI/control metadata and not high-level vector compute semantics.
Check selected RVV policy/config metadata remains plugin-owned and distinct from source active-lane authority.
Check the route remains extension ops to common EmitC artifacts without descriptor-driven computation.
Check runtime n/AVL, selected vector config, descriptor element_count, and artifact metadata remain layered and fail closed.
Check focused lit/build/artifact/RVV evidence is sufficient and does not overclaim performance or generic vector support.
